title: Austin Schuetz
seo_title: Freelance Front-End Web Developer in Denver, Colorado | Austin Schuetz
seo_description: Freelance front-end web developer in Denver, CO and AI integration partner for startups. WordPress, full-stack builds, and Claude API work.

blocks.heading: Freelance front-end developer and AI technical partner.
blocks.lede_md: I build fast, well-crafted websites for clients in Denver and beyond — and I partner with startups that want serious AI built in, not bolted on. That means real Claude API work: agents, automations, and products that ship. This site is one of them.

items.title: Front-end & WordPress builds
items.body_md: Custom themes, fast marketing sites, and the kind of hand-tuned front-end work that started my career. Clean HTML, no bloat, and pages that load before your coffee does.

items.title: Full-stack product engineering
items.body_md: Idea to production. React, Next.js, React Native, Postgres, payments, auth — the whole stack. I ship real products with real users, not prototypes that die in a demo.

items.title: AI & Claude integration partnership
items.body_md: A technical co-founder-shaped partner for startups adding AI. I've built multi-agent systems and vision pipelines on the **Claude API** — Sonnet and Opus in production, not slideware.

items.title: We Have Food at Home
items.body_md: Point your phone at the fridge, get a week of dinners. An installable PWA that scans your groceries with AI vision and fills a King Soopers cart for you.

items.title: Tally
items.body_md: Self-hosted invoicing for solo freelancers. Stripe cards and ACH, hosted pay pages, PDF invoices, encrypted backups. The boring plumbing clients actually pay for.

items.title: Bush League Baseball
items.body_md: A Unity 6 baseball roguelite. Thirteen modular C# projects, a token-driven brand bible governing the UI, and AI-generated character art. Design-system thinking, ported to game dev.

items.title: Dynasty Draft War Room
items.body_md: A live draft board for Sleeper dynasty leagues — polls picks every eight seconds, keeps a best-player-available board 327 players deep, and ships as one self-contained 220KB HTML file. Built in a Claude session before draft night.

items.title: This site is the demo
items.body_md: No WordPress, no framework, no database. A flat-file PHP CMS with a drag-and-drop block editor, hand-built with **Claude Code** — a working demo of how I build with AI, and proof the AI-assisted workflow ships production software.

blocks.body_md: Before the products, there was a decade of client work — freelance and agency WordPress sites across Denver and beyond. Some are still live; many have been retired or redesigned, and are preserved through the Wayback Machine. [Browse the full archive →](/archive)

blocks.heading: Have a build in mind?
blocks.body_md: Whether it's a marketing site that needs to load fast, a product that needs shipping, or an AI integration you want done right — let's talk.
